title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people making pancakes. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A father and his daughter are making pancakes in a kitchen. The girl is pouring mixture into a bowl while her father is cooking a pancake in a frying pan. There is fruit, milk and plates on the worktop.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people visiting an aquarium. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two children are visiting an aquarium with their mother. They are standing in front of a large glass tank and looking at colourful fish. There are rocks, plants and blue water inside the tank.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
